description: Cross-language lightweight SDK entrypoints for parsing natural-language mission descriptions into task, workflow, cron, or trigger drafts.
principles: Expose mission intent parsing as a reusable SDK capability instead of a platform-internal page action.
Keep mission parse as a focused slice over /v1/missions/parse so external pages, plugins, CLIs, and automation scripts can depend on it without importing the full generated client.
Treat parse output as a draft for callers to review or execute through their chosen task/workflow/cron/trigger surface.

capabilities.name: parse
capabilities.description: Parse a natural-language mission description into a structured task/workflow/cron/trigger draft.
